name: yamlcrew
description: Curated agent skills by yamlcrew and nchekwa.

plugins.name: fumadocs-engineer
plugins.description: Senior engineer for Fumadocs, the Next.js documentation framework — scaffolds, configures, and debugs docs sites and authors MDX content.

plugins.name: zensical-writer
plugins.description: Senior technical writer and engineer for Zensical, the static site generator by the Material for MkDocs team — scaffolds, configures, and authors documentation sites.

plugins.name: opencode-agent-cc
plugins.description: Run the headless OpenCode CLI from Claude Code for code review, adversarial review, second opinions, and write-capable rescue/fix tasks — respecting the user's configured provider and model.

plugins.name: pi-agent-cc
plugins.description: Run the headless pi CLI (`pi -p`) from Claude Code for code review, adversarial review, second opinions, and write-capable rescue/fix tasks — respecting the user's configured provider and model.

plugins.name: lazy-senior-dev
plugins.description: Lazy senior dev mode. Forces the simplest, shortest solution that actually works: YAGNI, stdlib first, no unrequested abstractions. Activates on the /lazy-senior-dev:* commands or when its description matches — no always-on session hooks.

plugins.name: agent-host-protocol
plugins.description: Reference for the Agent Host Protocol (AHP) — the JSON-RPC, channel-based state-sync protocol for multi-client AI agent sessions — covering channels, actions, reducers, write-ahead reconciliation, tool calls, and authentication.
